title: fix(deps): update module github.com/moby/buildkit to v0.20.2
body:

|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/moby/buildkit](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit) | `v0.20.1` -> `v0.20.2` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fmoby%2fbuildkit/v0.20.2?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fmoby%2fbuildkit/v0.20.2?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fmoby%2fbuildkit/v0.20.1/v0.20.2?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fmoby%2fbuildkit/v0.20.1/v0.20.2?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>moby/buildkit (github.com/moby/buildkit)</summary>

### [`v0.20.2`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/tag/v0.20.2)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/compare/v0.20.1...v0.20.2)

buildkit 0.20.2

Welcome to the v0.20.2 release of buildkit!

Please try out the release binaries and report any issues at
https://github.com/moby/buildkit/issues.

##### Contributors

-   Akihiro Suda
-   Derek McGowan
-   Jonathan A. Sternberg

##### Changes

-   Fix possible UID overflow when setting user for container [#​5844](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5844) https://github.com/containerd/containerd/security/advisories/GHSA-265r-hfxg-fhmg
-   update RootlessKit to v2.3.4 [#​5825](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5825)

##### Dependency Changes

-   **github.com/containerd/containerd/v2**  v2.0.3 -> v2.0.4

Previous release can be found at [v0.20.1](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/tag/v0.20.1)

</details>
